title: Single Eval Task
description: Schema for one entry in workspace/evals/eval-tasks.json. eval-tasks.json itself is a JSON array of these.

description.description: Realistic user-like task description. MUST NOT leak Skill-internal terminology (checked by skill_term_leakage_check).

expectedBehavior.description: What a correctly-reasoning agent should do. Concrete and checkable.

judgingCriteria.description: Grader's rubric for pass/fail and for distinguishing A from B.
